title: Cafeteria Menu and Feedback Notice
title_zh: 員工餐廳菜單與意見回饋通知

all.en: Hello team, welcome to the May edition of the cafeteria newsletter.
all.zh: 團隊您好，歡迎閱讀員工餐廳 5 月份電子報。

all.en: Our culinary team has refreshed the menu with eight seasonal dishes.
all.zh: 餐飲團隊已推出八道當季新菜色。

all.en: Spring vegetables now appear in salads, soups, and warm grain bowls.
all.zh: 春季蔬菜現已運用於沙拉、湯品與溫熱穀物碗中。

all.en: Monday features a Mediterranean lentil stew with grilled flatbread.
all.zh: 週一主打地中海扁豆燉菜搭配烤薄餅。

all.en: Tuesday offers Thai green curry with jasmine rice and tofu options.
all.zh: 週二供應泰式綠咖哩配茉莉香米，並有豆腐選項。

all.en: Wednesday brings classic shepherd pie alongside roasted root vegetables.
all.zh: 週三推出經典牧羊人派搭配烤根莖蔬菜。

all.en: Thursday is regional Korean day with bibimbap and seaweed soup.
all.zh: 週四為韓式區域日，供應石鍋拌飯與海帶湯。

all.en: Friday closes the week with house-made pizza and garden salad bar.
all.zh: 週五以手作披薩與沙拉吧為一週畫下句點。

all.en: Vegetarian, vegan, and halal selections are available every day.
all.zh: 素食、純素及清真選項每日皆有供應。

all.en: All meals follow company nutrition guidelines for sodium and saturated fat.
all.zh: 所有餐點皆遵循公司鈉與飽和脂肪營養指引。

all.en: Allergen labels appear next to every dish in the serving line.
all.zh: 供餐線上每道菜旁皆標示過敏原。

all.en: Please inform a chef if you have severe allergies before ordering.
all.zh: 若有嚴重過敏，點餐前請告知廚師。

all.en: We are proud to source seventy percent of produce from local farms.
all.zh: 本公司自豪有 70% 食材來自在地農場。

all.en: Coffee beans now come from a fair trade cooperative in Honduras.
all.zh: 咖啡豆現由宏都拉斯公平貿易合作社供應。

all.en: Reusable cups earn you a fifty cent discount per beverage.
all.zh: 使用環保杯每杯飲品可享 50 美分折扣。

all.en: Disposable utensils will be phased out completely by August.
all.zh: 拋棄式餐具將於 8 月前完全淘汰。

all.en: Please rinse trays at the dish return station before stacking them.
all.zh: 請於餐具回收區沖洗餐盤後再行堆疊。

all.en: Your feedback drives our continuous improvement and seasonal planning.
all.zh: 您的回饋是我們持續改進與當季規劃的動力。

all.en: Scan the QR code at each table to complete a one-minute survey.
all.zh: 請掃描每張桌上之 QR Code 完成一分鐘調查。

all.en: Suggestions submitted before the fifteenth shape the following month menu.
all.zh: 於 15 日前提交之建議將反映於下月菜單。

all.en: Five lucky respondents each month receive a complimentary lunch voucher.
all.zh: 每月將抽出五位幸運回饋者贈送免費午餐券。

all.en: We also welcome chef collaboration ideas from our diverse global teams.
all.zh: 我們亦歡迎來自全球多元團隊的料理合作創意。

all.en: Thank you for dining with us and supporting sustainable food practices.
all.zh: 感謝您光臨並支持永續餐飲實踐。

all.en: Enjoy your meals and please share photos using hashtag CampusCafeMay.
all.zh: 祝您用餐愉快，並請以 hashtag CampusCafeMay 分享照片。

all.en: Cafeteria hours run from seven in the morning until three in the afternoon.
all.zh: 員工餐廳營業時間為上午 7 點至下午 3 點。

all.en: Coffee bar service extends until five for late afternoon meetings.
all.zh: 咖啡吧延長至下午 5 點，方便傍晚的會議。

all.en: Catering for internal events can be arranged through the online order portal.
all.zh: 內部活動之外燴可透過線上訂購入口安排。

all.en: Please submit catering requests at least three business days in advance.
all.zh: 外燴需求請於至少三個工作日前提出。

all.en: Pop-up tasting events take place on the first Wednesday of every month.
all.zh: 每月第一個週三將舉辦快閃試吃活動。

all.en: Next month features a Mexican street food showcase with live demonstrations.
all.zh: 下月主題為墨西哥街頭美食展示，並有現場示範。

all.en: Cooking classes for employees launch this summer on selected Saturdays.
all.zh: 員工烹飪課將於今夏部分週六開課。

all.en: Sign up through the wellness portal as spaces are limited each session.
all.zh: 請至健康促進入口報名，因每場名額有限。

all.en: All proceeds from class fees support a local food security charity.
all.zh: 課程費用所得將全數捐助當地食物保障公益團體。

all.en: Thank you for making our cafeteria a vibrant part of campus life.
all.zh: 感謝您讓員工餐廳成為園區生活中充滿活力的一環。

all.en: Special dietary needs can be discussed privately with our nutrition consultant.
all.zh: 特殊飲食需求可與本公司營養顧問私下討論。

all.en: Monthly office wellness challenges feature healthy menu items as rewards.
all.zh: 月度辦公室健康挑戰將以健康菜色作為獎勵。

all.en: Food waste in the cafeteria dropped twenty percent through better forecasting.
all.zh: 透過更精準的預估，餐廳廚餘已下降 20%。

all.en: Compost bins are clearly marked and emptied by facilities each afternoon.
all.zh: 堆肥桶有清楚標示，由總務於每日下午清理。

all.en: Surplus food at end of day is donated to a nearby shelter.
all.zh: 每日剩餘餐點將捐贈予附近的庇護中心。

all.en: Our partnership with that shelter has provided ten thousand meals annually.
all.zh: 本公司與該庇護中心的合作每年提供 1 萬份餐點。

all.en: Volunteer shifts at the shelter qualify for paid time off under policy.
all.zh: 依政策規定，該庇護中心的志工時段可計入帶薪假。

all.en: Cafeteria staff celebrate ten years of service this June with a special event.
all.zh: 員工餐廳同仁將於本年 6 月以特別活動慶祝十週年。

all.en: All employees are invited to join the anniversary lunch on June 12.
all.zh: 歡迎全體員工於 6 月 12 日參與週年午宴。

all.en: Together we make every meal a moment of connection and care.
all.zh: 齊心協力，讓每一餐都成為連結與關懷的時刻。

all.en: Honestly, my favorite Wednesday lunch tradition is grabbing shepherd pie and reading in the courtyard.
all.zh: 老實說，我最愛的週三午餐儀式就是端著牧羊人派去中庭一邊吃一邊看書。

all.en: Last week I sat next to a colleague from finance who was reading the same novel.
all.zh: 上週我隔壁坐了一位財務部的同事，竟然也在看同一本小說。

all.en: We ended up swapping recommendations over dessert, which felt like the best kind of office surprise.
all.zh: 我們最後在甜點時間互相推薦書，這種辦公室小驚喜真的最棒。

all.en: Try sitting at a different table this month and you will probably make a new friend too.
all.zh: 這個月試著換個位子坐，你應該也會交到新朋友。

all.en: My toddler keeps asking when the cafeteria pancake day happens, since I described it once at home.
all.zh: 我家小小孩一直問員工餐廳什麼時候會有鬆餅日，因為我有次在家提過。

all.en: Maybe we can sneak a family open day onto the agenda for late summer this year.
all.zh: 或許我們可以悄悄把家庭開放日塞進今年夏末的活動安排裡。

all.en: Please leave a quick comment in the survey if you have similar ideas for community moments.
all.zh: 如果您有類似的社區活動點子，請在調查表中簡短留言給我們。

all.en: Tiny ideas often grow into traditions that staff remember years after they leave the company.
all.zh: 小小的點子常常會長成傳統，讓員工離職多年後還會懷念。

all.en: I still talk about a soup recipe I learned from a chef at my very first job.
all.zh: 我到現在還會跟人聊到我第一份工作時，從廚師那邊學來的一道湯品食譜。

all.en: Food memories really do outlive nearly everything else we collect from our working lives.
all.zh: 食物的記憶真的比我們職場上累積的幾乎任何東西都還要長壽。
